# project.context.md
# -------------------------------------------------------
# This file is the single source of truth for your project.
# It is generated by the Phoebii interview and read by all agents.
# Edit carefully — changes here propagate everywhere.
# -------------------------------------------------------

## Meta

```yaml
phoebii_version: 1.0.0
created: ___________
last_updated: ___________
project_name: ___________
```

---

## Core Settings

> Set during the interview. These values are read by every agent.
> To change a value, update it here and Phoebii will propagate the change.

```yaml
governance:
  file: CLAUDE.md             # default — or AGENTS.md if chosen at init

research:
  mode: ___________           # context7 | web_search | task_aware | both

modes:
  tdd: false                  # toggle with /tdd on or /tdd off

scope:
  enforcement: soft           # soft | firm
                              # soft  — flags drift, user decides, no friction
                              # firm  — requires explicit override to proceed out of scope
```

---

## What We Are Building

> A plain language description of the project. Written during the interview,
> updated by the user as the project evolves. Agents read this to stay grounded.

```
___________
```

---

## Project Type

```yaml
type: ___________             # web_app | desktop_app | mobile_app | cli |
                              # api_service | library_sdk | landing_page | other
audience: ___________         # personal | team | customers | developers | open_source
phase: ___________            # blank_slate | idea_no_code | existing_code |
                              # refactor | inheriting
```

---

## Platform & Environment

```yaml
platform:
  targets: []                 # e.g. [windows, macos, linux] or [ios, android]
                              # or [modern_browsers] or [cloud, containerized]
  cross_platform_priority: false
  notes: ___________
```

---

## Stack & Constraints

```yaml
stack:
  languages: []               # e.g. [typescript, rust]
  frameworks: []              # e.g. [react, tauri, nextjs]
  styling: ___________        # e.g. tailwind | raw_css | styled_components
  component_library: ___________   # e.g. shadcn | radix | material_ui | none
  testing_framework: ___________   # e.g. vitest | jest | playwright
  package_manager: ___________     # e.g. npm | pnpm | yarn | cargo
  runtime: ___________             # e.g. node | deno | bun

constraints:
  must_use: []
  must_avoid: []
  notes: ___________
```

---

## Design System

> Populated by /design during the foundation interview.
> The full visual token set lives in .phoebii/design/tokens.md
> This section holds references only — not the full token definitions.

```yaml
design:
  tokens_file: .phoebii/design/tokens.md
  preview_file: .phoebii/design/preview.html
  preview_url: localhost:4242

  iconography:
    library: ___________      # e.g. lucide | heroicons | phosphor
    style: ___________        # outline | filled | duotone
    base_size: ___________    # e.g. 20px

  typography:
    heading: ___________
    body: ___________
    mono: ___________

  color:
    primary: ___________      # hex
    modes: ___________        # light | dark | both
    neutral_tone: ___________  # warm | cool | pure

  spacing:
    base_unit: ___________    # e.g. 8px

  border_radius: ___________  # sharp | subtle | rounded | pill
```

---

## Project Scope

> This is the agreed scope for the current phase.
> /scope reads this to evaluate ideation drift.
> Do not edit this casually — changes here affect how the scope watcher behaves.

### In Scope

```
- ___________
- ___________
- ___________
```

### Out of Scope (This Phase)

```
- ___________
- ___________
```

### Phase Definition

```yaml
current_phase: 1
phase_goal: ___________
phase_complete_when: ___________
```

---

## Active Agents

> Managed by Phoebii. Do not edit manually.

```yaml
always_on:
  - scope
  - design_enforcement

on_demand:
  - business
  - arch
  - code
  - research
  - doc
  - review
  - futures
  - design
  - test
  - debug

last_active: ___________
```

---

## Governance File Reference

> All agents that need to write a reference note will write to this file.
> Phoebii watches this value. If it changes, all references are updated automatically.

```yaml
governance_file: CLAUDE.md
governance_path: ./CLAUDE.md
```

---

## Futures Reference

> Ideas parked by /scope. Full entries live in .phoebii/futures/ideation.md
> This section holds a running count and the most recent park event.

```yaml
futures:
  log: .phoebii/futures/ideation.md
  total_parked: 0
  last_parked:
    idea: ___________
    date: ___________
```

---

## Change Log

> Phoebii appends here when significant project decisions are made or changed.
> Provides a human-readable audit trail without digging through git history.

| Date | Change | Agent | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|-------|
| YYYY-MM-DD | Project initialized | phoebii-init | Interview completed |

---

> ⚠️  Phoebii reads this file before every agent activation.
> Keep it accurate. When in doubt, run /review to audit current state.
